name: Asteroid Colony
short_description: In this real time strategy city builder game you will help humanity in reaching beyond earth by establishing a permanent and thriving settlement in the asteroid belt. Settling in space comes with enormous challenges and dangers, which you will have to guide your people through
detailed_description:
"The Earth is the cradle of humanity, but mankind cannot stay in the cradle forever."

- Konstantin Tsiolkovsky

Asteroid Colony is a real time strategy city builder and economy simulation game set in the future of mankind. Help humanity leave its cradle and establish a colony in the far away asteroid belt, outside the orbit of Mars.

It is up to you whether humanity can reach its centuries old goal of reaching for the stars, or whether the early attempts of space exploration will end in disaster.

Settle your first asteroid and start building a city with hundreds of inhabitants. Satisfy your peoples demands for water, food, electricity, and many other resources by building a robust economy that can withstand the harsh conditions of space.

Space is a resource-poor and dangerous place, with many meteors and comets on collision course with your settlement. If you don’t want your settlement to end in a giant fireball, you will need to find technologies to keep your residents alive and well. Build telescopes to find and track dangerous space rocks, and launch specialized rockets to deflect their trajectory enough to hopefully prevent them from colliding with your colony.

Mine cold and icy comets for organic compounds and the most precious resources there is: water. If your people are content with your management, they will level up and provide you with new technologies and buildings, but they will also increase their demands. Launch new spaceships and expand your colony to further asteroids, gaining access to new and valuable resources, which will help you satisfying the ever-increasing energy needs of your people and economy.

Make sure to get access to natural resources before your opponents do. Even then, you should always be prepared for an attack on you. In the worst case, you will have to fight for the survival of your people. Use your industrial power to outproduce all other players and to gain the military superiority.

The ultimate goal of your colony in the Asteroid Belt is to help humanity reach beyond the solar system. To complete this daring undertaking, you will construct a giant spacecraft, which will take your people all the way to Alpha Centauri.
